description: Company can manage both flats and houses from properties page
steps: Verify route 'company/properties' is registered in routes.ts
Verify company.properties._index.tsx renders tab toggle for Flats and Houses
Verify the page shows flat list with edit and delete buttons
Verify the page shows house list with edit and delete buttons
Verify 'Add Flat' button links to /company/flats/new
Verify 'Add House' button links to /company/properties/houses/new
Verify RoleGuard uses allowedRole='company' prop
Build succeeds: npm run build

description: Company can create a new house
steps: Verify route 'company/properties/houses/new' is registered in routes.ts
Verify company.properties.houses.new.tsx renders HouseForm component
Verify HouseForm has fields for title, description, address, price, bedrooms, bathrooms, area, lot size, house type
Verify HouseForm supports cover image and floor plan uploads
Verify successful creation navigates to /company/properties
Verify RoleGuard uses allowedRole='company' prop
Build succeeds: npm run build

description: Company can edit and delete an existing house
steps: Verify route 'company/properties/houses/:id' is registered in routes.ts
Verify company.properties.houses.$id.tsx pre-fills HouseForm with existing data
Verify the page has a delete button with confirmation dialog
Verify successful deletion navigates to /company/properties
Verify RoleGuard uses allowedRole='company' prop (in all 3 render paths)
Build succeeds: npm run build
